label: df
description: Keep filesystem usage table headers and mounted filesystems.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
udev            2.0G     0  2.0G   0% /dev
/dev/sda1        50G   45G  5.0G  90% /
tests.expected:
Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/sda1        50G   45G  5.0G  90% /
